name: Mile-High Shredded Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 chuck roast or round steak, 3 pounds
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, heat oil over medium heat. Brown beef on both sides.
2. Add onion and celery; cook until the meat is almost browned.
3. Pour in broth; bring to a simmer. Cover and cook for 3-4 hours or until meat is tender.
4. Remove meat from the pot; shred it using forks.
5. Drain vegetables, reserving about 1-1/2 cups of broth in the pot.
6. Skim off any fat that has risen to the surface.
7. Return shredded meat and reserved broth to the Dutch oven. Add remaining ingredients.
8. Simmer until heated through.
9. (Keeps well in a slow cooker on low heat.) Remove bay leaf before serving.
YIELD: 8 servings
